pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the tennis academy, surfacing key booking flows (classes, courts, lessons, camps, tournaments), featured memberships and content, and shortcuts into common user tasks.
primary_functions: Highlight main pathways for booking classes, courts, lessons, camps, and tournaments
Show quick links to this week’s group classes and next available court bookings
Promote featured membership plans and camp weeks
Provide direct access to articles/resources and current promotions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View Adult/Junior Classes' CTA or featured class widget
Click on a featured group class card from 'This Week’s Classes'
Click on a 'Book a Court' or featured court slot
Click on 'View Memberships' section or featured membership
Click on a specific featured membership plan
Click on a featured camp week
Click on 'Upcoming Tournaments & Events'
Click on 'Training Articles & Resources' or a featured article section header
Click on a featured article card
Click on mini-cart or 'View Booking Summary' from homepage

access_methods.description: Default landing page when visiting the base site URL

pages.name: Programs & Group Classes
pages.description: Listing and schedule page for all adult and junior group classes, with filters and sorting for finding suitable sessions.
primary_functions: Browse and filter group classes by audience (adult/junior), level (beginner/intermediate/advanced), focus (cardio, strategy, match play), date range, time of day, and price
Sort class options by price (e.g., low to high) and start time to find cheapest and earliest suitable sessions
View class cards with key details such as level, price, time, and remaining spots
Open a selected class’s detail page for full description and booking

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected audience filter, e.g., 'adult' or 'junior'.
Pre-selected level filter, e.g., 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced'.
Optional focus filter such as 'cardio', 'strategy', 'match_play'.
Start date for the schedule window (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., upcoming weekend start.
End date for the schedule window (YYYY-MM-DD).
Earliest class start time to display (HH:MM), e.g., '17:00' for evening classes.
Latest class end time to display (HH:MM).
Lower bound of class price filter.
Upper bound of class price filter, e.g., 35 for finding cheap beginner classes.
Sort field such as 'price' or 'start_datetime'.
Sort direction 'asc' or 'desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a class name or a specific session in the schedule
Click 'View Cart' from the header or mini-cart

access_methods.description: Accessed with pre-applied filters when redirected from other flows (e.g., training plan or homepage CTAs).

pages.name: Class Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific group class type with description, instructor details, policies, and a list of upcoming sessions for booking.
primary_functions: Show full description, level, coach, price, and policies for the selected class
Display a list or calendar of upcoming class sessions with dates and times
Allow the user to choose a specific session (e.g., this weekend after 5:00 PM) and confirm availability
Provide a simple booking form (name, email) to add the selected session to the cart or booking summary

incoming_params.description: GroupClassType ID for which to show details and sessions.
Optional GroupClassSession ID to pre-select in the sessions list.
Optional filter start date for sessions shown.
Optional filter end date for sessions shown.
Optional earliest start time for sessions displayed.
Optional latest start time for sessions displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart / Booking Summary' after successfully booking a session
Click breadcrumb or 'Back to all classes' link
Click on the coach’s name or 'View Coach Profile'

access_methods.description: Accessed with class type ID and optional session ID from Programs or other deeplinks.

pages.name: Memberships
pages.description: Overview and comparison page for all membership plans, including benefits and included group sessions per month.
primary_functions: List all membership plans with monthly price, included benefits, and number of group sessions per month
Filter or visually highlight plans that include at least a specified number of group sessions (e.g., 4+ per month)
Compare basic plan attributes in a side-by-side table to identify cheaper options
Open a membership’s detail page for more information and plan-specific inquiry

incoming_params.description: Minimum included group sessions per month used to pre-filter or highlight plans (e.g., 4).
Optional membership plan ID to visually highlight in the comparison table.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a membership card or 'Learn More' link
Click generic 'Contact Us About Memberships' link

pages.name: Membership Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a single membership plan, including inclusions, terms, and a plan-specific inquiry form.
primary_functions: Show full details of the selected membership plan including price, included group sessions, perks, and terms
Confirm that the plan meets criteria such as including at least 4 group sessions per month
Provide a plan-specific inquiry form requesting name, email, message, and contact preferences
Submit the membership inquiry and display an on-page confirmation without leaving the site

incoming_params.description: MembershipPlan ID to display details for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all membership plans'
Click 'Need more help? Contact us' (general contact beyond plan-specific inquiry)

access_methods.description: Accessed with membership plan ID from Memberships or homepage.

pages.name: Court Booking
pages.description: Interactive court reservation page for booking indoor or outdoor courts by date, surface, location, and time.
primary_functions: Allow date selection (e.g., next Wednesday) via a calendar or date picker
Filter courts by surface (e.g., hard court) and location (indoor/outdoor)
Display an availability grid or time slots and support selecting a continuous time block (e.g., 7:00 PM–8:30 PM)
Provide a reservation form including start/end time, play format (singles/doubles), player names, and contact details
Add the confirmed court reservation to the cart or booking summary and show a brief confirmation

incoming_params.description: Date to pre-select in the court booking calendar (YYYY-MM-DD).
Surface filter such as 'hard', 'clay', 'grass'.
Location type filter such as 'indoor' or 'outdoor'.
Earliest time to show availability slots (HH:MM).
Latest time to show availability slots (HH:MM).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Booking Summary' after reserving a court

access_methods.description: Accessed with pre-selected date and filters from homepage or cart.

pages.name: Coaches & Private Lessons
pages.description: Listing page of coaches available for private lessons with filters by specialty and rating.
primary_functions: List all available coaches with photo, rating, specialties, and key credentials
Filter coaches by specialty focus (e.g., backhand improvement) and minimum rating (e.g., 4.5+)
Search or browse to identify suitable backhand-specialist coaches meeting rating criteria
Open a coach’s profile page to view detailed bio, schedule, and book a private lesson

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected coach specialty filter, e.g., 'backhand'.
Minimum coach rating filter, e.g., 4.5.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a coach card or 'View Profile'
Click 'View Cart' from header while browsing coaches

pages.name: Coach Profile
pages.description: Profile page for an individual coach, showing bio, specialties, ratings, and a schedule to book private lessons.
primary_functions: Display detailed coach information including specialties, rating, experience, and teaching style
Show a booking calendar for private lessons with filters for weekdays and time of day (e.g., evening after 4:00 PM)
Allow selection of the earliest available suitable 60-minute lesson slot
Provide a lesson booking form where the user sets duration, adds name, email, and lesson notes (e.g., focus on backhand), and adds the lesson to the cart or booking summary

incoming_params.description: Coach ID whose profile and schedule should be displayed.
Optional start date for available slots filter (YYYY-MM-DD).
Optional end date for available slots filter (YYYY-MM-DD).
If true, restricts available slots to Monday–Friday.
Earliest lesson start time to display (e.g., '16:00').
Latest lesson start time to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Booking Summary' after booking a private lesson
Click 'Back to all coaches' from profile page

access_methods.description: Accessed with coach ID and optional slot filters from Coaches listing or deeplinks.

pages.name: Camps
pages.description: Listing page for junior and youth tennis camps and clinic weeks, with filters for age group, date, and format.
primary_functions: Filter camp offerings by age group (e.g., ages 9–12), date range/month (e.g., July), and camp format (full day, half-day AM, half-day PM)
Browse camp weeks starting on specific dates (such as a week starting July 15)
View key camp details including times (morning vs. afternoon) and prices to ensure options are under a budget (e.g., under $300)
Open a specific camp’s detail page to see full information and start enrollment

incoming_params.description: Age group ID to pre-select (e.g., covering ages 9–12).
Month number used to focus camp search (e.g., 7 for July).
Year associated with the selected month for camps.
Pre-filter session type such as 'half_day_am' or 'full_day'.
Maximum price filter for camp sessions (e.g., 300).
Earliest camp start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for search.
Latest camp start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for search.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific camp week / session card
Click 'View Cart' from header while browsing camps

pages.name: Camp Detail
pages.description: Detailed information and enrollment page for a specific camp week or session, with options such as morning half-day or full-day.
primary_functions: Show full camp description, age range, schedule (including morning half-day options), and price for each option
Confirm that a selected camp option (e.g., morning half-day starting July 15) meets age and price constraints
Provide an enrollment form capturing child details (name, age, age group), parent/guardian contact information, t-shirt size, and medical notes
Submit the camp enrollment and add the chosen camp session to the cart or registration summary

incoming_params.description: Camp ID for which to show full details and sessions.
Optional camp session ID (week/option) to pre-select in the enrollment UI.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Registration Summary' after enrolling in a camp session
Click 'Back to all camps' from a camp detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed with camp ID and optional session ID from Camps listing or deeplinks.

pages.name: Tournaments & Events
pages.description: Listing page for upcoming tournaments and competitive events with filters by date and status.
primary_functions: Browse all upcoming tournaments with dates, locations, and basic formats
Filter tournaments by month or date range (e.g., next month) and by available rating brackets
Identify tournaments that offer specific skill brackets such as 3.0–3.5
Open a tournament’s detail page to view full event options and register

incoming_params.description: Month to display tournaments for (e.g., next month).
Year associated with the selected month.
Earliest date for tournaments to list (YYYY-MM-DD).
Latest date for tournaments to list (YYYY-MM-DD).
Tournament status filter, typically 'upcoming'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tournament name or 'View Details'
Click 'View Cart' while reviewing tournaments

pages.name: Tournament Detail
pages.description: Detail and registration page for a specific tournament, including events, rating brackets, and registration forms.
primary_functions: Show full tournament information including dates, events (singles/doubles), and rating brackets
Allow selection of event type (e.g., singles) and specific rating bracket (e.g., 3.0–3.5)
Provide a registration form collecting player name, rating, email, emergency contact, phone, and preferences like preferred match time and t-shirt size
Submit the tournament registration and display an on-page confirmation or registration summary

incoming_params.description: Tournament ID whose detail and events should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Registration Summary' after registering for a tournament event
Click breadcrumb 'Back to Tournaments'

access_methods.description: Accessed with tournament ID from the Tournaments listing or deeplinks.

pages.name: Articles & Resources
pages.description: Blog and resources listing page for training, technique, and wellness content, with search and filters.
primary_functions: Provide search and filter tools to find articles by topic (e.g., serve technique, injury prevention) or category
List articles with titles, short summaries, and key tags for quick scanning
Allow users to click into an article detail page for full content
Offer navigation or a visible link to the user’s Reading List of saved articles

incoming_params.description: Search text for article titles and content (e.g., 'serve technique', 'injury prevention').
Category filter for articles, such as 'Technique' or 'Injury Prevention'.
Tag filter for articles, e.g., 'serve technique', 'injury prevention'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title or 'Read More'
Click link/button to 'My Reading List'

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full-content page for an individual training or information article, with ability to save it to the Reading List.
primary_functions: Display the full article content including headings, media, and related resources
Allow the user to save or unsave the article to/from their Reading List via a clear button or bookmark icon
Provide navigation back to the main articles listing or to related articles
Indicate saved status so the user knows whether the article is already in their Reading List

incoming_params.description: Article ID to load and display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Articles' or a category link
Click a related article in the 'Related Articles' section
Click 'View Reading List' after saving an article

access_methods.description: Accessed with article ID from Articles list, homepage, or Reading List.

pages.name: Reading List
pages.description: Personal saved-articles page for training content the user wants to revisit, such as serve technique and injury prevention.
primary_functions: List all articles the user has saved, including serve technique and injury prevention content
Allow users to open any saved article in the article detail page
Support removing articles from the Reading List to keep it organized
Confirm visually that newly saved articles appear in the list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved article title
Click link to 'Browse more articles'

access_methods.description: Accessed from Articles or Article Detail via 'Reading List' links.

pages.name: Cart & Booking Summary
pages.description: Unified summary page for all booked items including classes, courts, lessons, camps, and tournaments.
primary_functions: Display all current bookings and registrations (group classes, private lessons, camps, court reservations, tournaments) as line items
Show the price of each item and the total combined cost for budgeting purposes (e.g., verifying a 3-day plan under $120)
Allow users to remove items (e.g., the most expensive session) or adjust quantities where applicable
Provide an overview of dates and times to ensure there are no scheduling conflicts before final confirmation

incoming_params.description: Optional cart item ID to highlight (e.g., the item just added).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Edit' on a group class booking line item
Click 'Edit' on a court reservation line item
Click 'Edit' on a private lesson line item
Click 'Edit' on a camp enrollment line item
Click 'View Tournament' from a tournament registration line item

access_methods.description: Linked from booking confirmations on detail pages.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page about the tennis academy, philosophy, history, and facilities, with light contact and staff context.
primary_functions: Explain the academy’s mission, coaching approach, and history
Highlight facilities such as indoor hard courts and training amenities
Introduce key staff and coaching leadership at a high level
Provide reassurance and context for new visitors considering programs or memberships

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact Us' button on the About page

access_methods.description: Accessible directly via URL for users learning about the academy.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries not tied to a specific plan or program, with a form and static contact info.
primary_functions: Provide a general contact form capturing name, email, subject, message, and preferred contact method
Offer basic contact information such as phone number, address, and embedded map to the academy
Allow users to send questions about programs, facilities, or scheduling outside of structured flows
Display confirmation that the message was sent successfully without leaving the site

incoming_params.description: Optional subject line prefill for the contact form.
Optional context type (e.g., 'membership', 'general') to indicate what the inquiry relates to.
Optional related entity ID (such as a membership plan ID) for internal reference.

header_links.description: Browse and book group classes and weekly programs
Reserve indoor or outdoor tennis courts
Find coaches and book private lessons
Explore and enroll in junior tennis camps
View and register for tournaments and events
View your booking summary and registrations
Get in touch with the academy

footer_links.description: Learn more about the tennis academy
General contact information and inquiry form
Overview of group programs and classes
Book courts by date, surface, and location
